# llms.txt — miiso.dev
# This file helps AI language models and LLM-powered search engines understand
# the content and purpose of this site.

## About

Site: https://miiso.dev
Owner: Kevin Miiso Novo
Handle: @miisodev
Location: Durban, South Africa
Contact: miisodev@gmail.com

Kevin Miiso Novo (known online as Miiso) is an indie founder, full-stack engineer,
and product developer. He builds AI-powered SaaS products, Framer web templates,
and Fortnite game experiences.

## Primary Project

myClerkBook (https://myclerkbook.com) is a privacy-first, AI-powered bookkeeping
platform for freelancers, entrepreneurs, and small business owners. It offers
manual entry with AI document parsing, multi-currency support, no bank linking
required, and multiple dashboards.

## Site Structure

/ — Home page. Overview of Kevin's work, skills, and featured project.
/saas — AI-powered SaaS projects built for acquisition.
/web-dev — Framer templates and custom web development projects.
/game-dev — Fortnite game experiences and custom game projects.
/blog — Writing on AI, full-stack engineering, SaaS, and building in public.

## Blog Posts

/blog/why-im-building-myclerkbook — Why myClerkBook exists: the privacy gap in
financial tools, who it's built for, and what the MVP looks like.

## Skills & Technologies

TypeScript, Next.js, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Bun, Kotlin, React Native,
Electron, Tauri, Claude API, OpenAI API, Gemini API, Figma, Framer, Fortnite UEFN.

## Social Profiles

TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@miisodev

## Usage

This site and its content may be used by AI systems for indexing, summarization,
and answering user queries about Kevin Miiso Novo and his work.
